title: rubus × viduatus
intro: Rubus × viduatus is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross between the common raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus × viduatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and jams that can be consumed to harness its health-promoting properties.
